琈द瀖ली सद瀡य 3. 炈ी अिनल कुमार 琐सह, संयु榉त सिचव (थम榁ल), ऊजा榁 मं灴ालय, नई 琈द瀖ली सद瀡य 4. डा. अिमता 灹साद, संयु榉त सिचव (灹शा.), जल संसाधन और गंगा संर楹ण मं灴ालय, नई 琈द瀖ली सद瀡य 5. 炈ी एस.एस. मोहंती, अपर सिचव और अ瀄तेरना, िजला सोनीपत, ह琇रयाणा सद瀡य 14. 炈ी िववेक नारायण शेजवलकर, मेयर, नगर िनगम, 榑वािलयर, म瀇य 灹देश सद瀡य धारा 3 क琉 उपधारा (2) के खंड (ङ) के अधीन नािमत सद瀡य 15. 炈ी एन. कुमार, िनदेशक (तकनीक琉) कोल इंिडया िलिमटेड, कोलकाता सद瀡य 16. 炈ी संजीव 琐सह, िनदेशक (प琇रशोधनशाला) इंिडयन ऑयल कारपोरेशन िलिमटेड, नई 琈द瀖ली सद瀡य धारा 3 क琉 उपधारा (2) के खंड (च) के अधीन नािमत सद瀡य 17. डा. ए.बी. अकोलकर, सद瀡य सिचव, क犆灶ीय 灹दूषण िनयं灴ण बोड榁, 琈द瀖ली सद瀡य सिचव [सं. 榉यू-15014/21/2009-सीपीड瀑瀖यू ] डा. रािशद हसन, सलाहकार (सीपी) 琇ट瀉पणः 琇ट瀉पणः 琇ट瀉पणः 琇ट瀉पणः क犆灶ीय 灹दूषण िनयं灴ण बोड榁 ग琇ठत करने वाली मूल अिधसूचना भारत के राजप灴 सं榐यांक सा.का.िन. 998(अ), तारीख 21 िसतंबर, 1974 को 灹कािशत क琉 गई थी और अंितम पुनग榁ठन अिधसूचना सं榐यांक का.आ. 1621(अ) तारीख 27 िसतंबर, 2006 獧ारा 琈कया गया था । MINISTRY OF ENVIRONMENT, FORESTS AND CLIMATE CHANGE NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 23rd March, 2015 S.O. 814(E).— In exercise of the powers conferred by section 3 and sub-section (6) of section 5 of the Water (Prevention and Control of Pollution) Act, 1974 (6 of 1974), and in supersession of the notification of the Government of India in the erstwhile Ministry of Environment and Forests number S.O. 1621 (E), dated the 27th September, 2006, except as respects things done or omitted to be done before such supersession, the Central Government hereby reconstitutes the Central Pollution Control Board and nominates the following persons as its members, with effect from the date of publication of this notification in the Official Gazette, namely :- Sl. No. Name and Address Remarks 1. Shri Shashi Shekhar, Special Secretary, Ministry of Environment, Forests and Climate Change, and Chairman, Central Pollution Control Board, Delhi Chairman Members nominated under clause (b) of sub-section (2) of section 3 2. Shri Praveen Prakash, Joint Secretary (Works and Swachh Bharat Mission), Ministry of Urban Development, New Delhi Member 3. Shri Anil Kumar Singh, Joint Secretary (Thermal), Ministry of Power, New Delhi Member 4. Dr. Amita Prasad, Joint Secretary (A), Ministry of Water Resources and Ganga Rejuvenation, New Delhi Member 5. Shri S.S. Mohanty, Additional Secretary and Financial Adviser, Ministry of Environment, Forests and Climate Change, New Delhi Member 6. Dr. Rashid Hasan, Adviser, CP Division, Ministry of Environment, Forests and Climate Change, New Delhi Member Members nominated under clause (c) of sub-section (2) of section 3 7. Shri Syed Javed Abbas, Chairman, Uttar Pradesh, Pollution Control Board, Lucknow Member 8. Dr. Ayi Vaman N. Acharya, Chairman, Karnataka Pollution Control Board, Bengaluru Member 9. Akolkar, Member Secretary, Central Pollution Control Board, Delhi Member Secretary [No. Q-15014/21/2009-CPW] Dr. RASHID HASAN, Adviser (CP) Note: The Principal notification constituting the Central Pollution Control Board was published in the Gazette of India vide number G.S.R. 998(E), dated the 21st September, 1974 and last reconstituted vide notification number S.O. 1621(E), dated the 27th September, 2006.
